title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following policies for managing migration and promoting integration, then decide which two would be most effective.
options: Providing comprehensive language and cultural orientation programmes
Creating pathways to employment for skilled migrants
Investing in multicultural education in schools
Ensuring equal legal rights and protections for migrants
Building community centres and social spaces for diverse groups

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to migration and cultural diversity. Discuss the following policies for managing migration and promoting integration, then decide which two would be most effective. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most effective..
